name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/week tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/week, inconsistent inventory levels cause stockouts. We automate weekly inventory usage data alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inconsistent inventory levels leading to stockouts
features: Email alert system for restock thresholds
